text: <u>HPIC Lab</u> was selected for the "200+ Gbps-Class Next-Generation Ultra-High-Speed Interface Semiconductor Design Technologies" project, sponsored by the Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy (MOTIE).

<u>HPIC Lab</u> was selected for the "Development of Ultra-High Bandwidth, Low-Latency Serial Interface Technology for Heterogeneous Devices" project, sponsored by the Ministry of Science and ICT (MSIT).
A paper entitled "Comparison of 3T2C Embedded DRAM in 28nm FD-SOI and Low Power Plus for Energy-Efficient Computing in Memory Architecture" has been accepted in the JICAS. Congratulations!
A paper entitled "Low-Complexity Referenceless Clock and Data Recovery with a Novel Alexander Phase-Frequency Detector" has been accepted in the JICAS. Congratulations!
"IGA-SRAM: A Compact SRAM-based IMC Engine for Binary/Ternary Deep Neural Networks with ADC-Less and Error-Aware Training Algorithm" has been accepted in the IEEE JETCAS. Congratulations!
A paper entitled "A Pattern-Dependent Pulse Filtering Technique for Low-Jitter Injection-Locked CDR in 28-nm CMOS" has been accepted in the IEEE TVLSI. Congratulations!
A paper entitled "Built-In Phase Noise Measurement System for Multi-GHz Phase-Locked Loops" has been accepted in the IEEE TIM. Congratulations!
<u>Min-Seong</u> has been appointed to the School of Electrical and Electronic Engineering at Yonsei University.
Dr. Jae-woo Park (Sungkyunkwan University) presented an invited talk entitled "High-speed Multi-level Transceiver for Memory Interface Applications" hosted by HPIC Lab.
<u>Min-Seong</u> presented an invited talk entitled "100Gb/s급 디지털 인터페이스 회로 설계" at KAIST (hosted by IDEC).
<u>Min-Seong</u> presented an invited talk entitled "Unlocking AI's True Potential: The Critical Role of High-Speed Interfaces" at Dongguk University.
<u>Min-Seong</u> presented an invited talk entitled "Unlocking AI's True Potential: The Critical Role of High-Speed Interfaces" at Yonsei University.
A patent entitled "주입 잠금 오실레이터 기반 물리적 복제 불가능 함수" has been registered with the Korean Intellectual Property Office.
<u>Jae-Geon</u> received the Best Student Paper Award (Bronze) from the IEEE Seoul Section.
<u>Dong-Ho</u> received the Best Student Paper Award (Bronze) from the IEEE Seoul Section.
<u>Seung-Hwan</u> received the Best Student Paper Award (Bronze) from the IEEE Seoul Section.
A paper entitled "A Stagger-Tuned Cryogenic Broadband CMOS Three-Stage Cascode LNA for Quantum Computing" has been accepted in the IEEE MWTL. Congratulations!
<u>Min-Seong</u> received the Achievement Award (공로상) from the IEIE (대한전자공학회) Semiconductor Society.
<u>Min-Seong</u> received the Achievement Award (공로상) from the IEIE (대한전자공학회).
A patent entitled "6 트랜지스터 정적 램 및 이를 이용한 프로세싱 인 메모리 가속 장치" has been registered with the Korean Intellectual Property Office.
A paper entitled "Implementation and Characterization of a Digital Phase-Locked Loop (DPLL) in 65-nm CMOS Technology" has been accepted in the JICAS. Congratulations!
<u>Min-Seong</u> served as an Organizing Committee Member for the 2025 IEIE Fall Conference.
<u>Min-Seong</u> presented an invited talk entitled "High-Speed Interface Circuit Design" at the University of Seoul.
<u>Seung-Hwan</u>, <u>Jae-Geon</u>, <u>Seung-Mo</u>, <u>Dong-Ho</u>, and <u>Min-Seong</u> presented an invited talk entitled "Analog Modeling" at LX Semicon.
<u>Min-Seong</u> presented an invited talk entitled "DSP-based Wireline Communication" at Korea University (hosted by Prof. Chulwoo Kim).
Prof. Seung-Hyeon Moon presented an invited talk entitled "Two Challenges in AI Accelerators," hosted by HPIC Lab.
<u>Min-Seong</u> served as the Special Session Organizing Co-Chair for IEEE/IEIE ICCE-ASIA 2025.
<u>Min-Seong</u> received the KSIA Award (한국반도체산업협회장상) at the 18th Semiconductor Day.
<u>Jae-Hyeon</u> received the Best Poster Award at the ISOCC 2025 Chip Design Contest.
<u>Seung-Hwan</u> received the Best Paper Award from the SSCS Seoul Chapter at ISOCC 2025.
<u>Dong-Hoe</u> and <u>Seung-Hwan</u> received the Special Prize at the ISOCC 2025 Chip Design Contest.
<u>Seung-Mo</u> and <u>Dong-Ho</u> received the Best Paper Award from the SSCS Seoul Chapter at ISOCC 2025.
<u>Min-Seong</u> served on the Organizing Committee for APCCAS 2025.
<u>Min-Seong</u> served on the Organizing Committee for ISOCC 2025.
<u>Dong-Hyun</u> and <u>Shin-Uk</u> received the Special Award at the 26th Korean Semiconductor Design Challenge.
<u>Seung-Mo</u> and <u>Dong-Ho</u> received 특허청장상 at the 26th Korean Semiconductor Design Challenge.
<u>Seung-Mo</u> was selected as a recipient of the Master's Student Research Grant from the National Research Foundation (NRF) of Korea.
<u>Jae-Geon</u> was selected as a recipient of the Master's Student Research Grant from the National Research Foundation (NRF) of Korea.

A paper entitled "Critical-Timing-Relaxed pre-Decision Feedforward Equalizer for High-Speed DSP-based Wireline Receiver using Hardware-in-the-Loop Verification on RF-SoC" has been accepted at the IEEE A-SSCC. Congratulations!
A paper entitled "A 22Gb/s-54Gb/s Reconfigurable PAM-2/4/8 DSP-Based Transmitter with 14-Tap Feedforward Equalization" has been accepted at the IEEE A-SSCC. Congratulations!
<u>Min-Seong</u> presented an invited talk entitled "High-Speed Integrated Circuit Design" at the 2025 SoC Workshop.
<u>Min-Seong</u> served on the Program Committee for the 2025 SoC Workshop.
A paper entitled "Analysis of Adaptive Learning Rate Strategies for Sign-Sign LMS: Stability and Speed" has been accepted at the ITC-CSCC. Congratulations!
<u>Min-Seong</u> served as a Session Chair and on the Organizing Committee for ITC-CSCC 2025.
<u>Min-Seong</u> served on the Program Committee for the 2025 상용반도체개발 기술워크숍.
A patent entitled "ADC 양자 인공신경망과 범용 Compute-in-Memory" has been registered with the Korean Intellectual Property Office.
A paper entitled "A 14-to-32-Gb/s Deadzone-Free Referenceless CDR With Autocovariance-Based Seamless Frequency Detector in 40-nm CMOS Technology" has been accepted in the IEEE JSSC. Congratulations!
<u>HPIC Lab</u> was selected for the "Interposer Technology with Integrated Opto-chiplets for CPO based on 2.5D Optical Packaging" project, sponsored by the Ministry of Science and ICT (MSIT).
A paper entitled "2.4 GHz BB Phase Detector를 이용한 Fast Lock & Low Noise RF Phase Locked Loop(PLL)" has been accepted at 대한전자공학회 하계학술대회. Congratulations!
A paper entitled "주입 잠금 발진기 기반 분주비 절감형 디지털 위상 잠금 회로" has been accepted at 대한전자공학회 하계학술대회. Congratulations!
A paper entitled "저복잡도 구조를 갖는 알렉산더 위상 검출기 기반 위상 - 주파수 검출기 설계" has been accepted at 대한전자공학회 하계학술대회. Congratulations!
A paper entitled "50Gbaud 송신기를 위한 고속 시리얼라이저" has been accepted at 대한전자공학회 하계학술대회. Congratulations!
A paper entitled "카운터 기반 비등간격 오버샘플링 PLL" has been accepted at 대한전자공학회 하계학술대회. Congratulations!
A paper entitled "아날로그 인메모리 컴퓨팅 연산 방식에 대한 분석" has been accepted at 대한전자공학회 하계학술대회. Congratulations!
A paper entitled "64-way ADC-DSP 기반 수신 회로의 구현: SS-LMS의 학습률의 변화에 기반한 적응형 알고리즘" has been accepted at 대한전자공학회 하계학술대회. Congratulations!
<u>HPIC Lab</u> was selected for the "Cryogenic Superconducting Quantum Computer Receiver" project, sponsored by Samsung Electronics.
A paper entitled "A Supply Noise-Insensitive Ring DCO With a Self-Biased Shunt Regulator Array in Wide-Range Digital PLL" has been accepted in the IEEE TVLSI. Congratulations!
<u>Min-Seong</u> presented an invited talk entitled "Basics of High-Speed Wireline Communication" at the Analog/Power IC Design Workshop.
<u>Min-Seong</u> served on the Program Committee for the 2025 Analog/Power IC Design Workshop.
<u>Min-Seong</u> served on the Program Committee for the 2025 SoC Conference.
<u>Sang-Hyeon</u> received the Best Paper Award (Silver Prize) at ICEIC 2025.
<u>Min-Seong</u> presented a talk entitled "The Future of High-Speed Wireline: Innovations in DSP-Based Transceiver Design" at ICEIC.
<u>Min-Seong</u> served as a Session Chair and on the Organizing Committee for ICEIC.
<u>Min-Seong</u> served as the Executive Director (상임이사) of the Next-Generation Leader Division at the IEIE.
A paper entitled "A Compact Single-Channel 1 GS/s 8-Bit 3-Stage Capacitor Array-Assisted Charge-Injection DAC-Based SAR ADC" has been accepted in the IEEE TCAS-I. Congratulations!
A paper entitled "3.2-GHz Digital Phase-Locked Loop with Autocorrelation-based Direct Jitter Correction" has been accepted in the IEEE TCAS-II. Congratulations!
A paper entitled "A 14-to-32-Gb/s Deadzone-Free Referenceless CDR with Autocovariance-based Frequency Detector in 40-nm CMOS Technology" has been accepted at the IEEE A-SSCC. Congratulations!

A paper entitled "High-Precision Built-In Phase Noise Measurement Circuit With a Hybrid ΔΣ Time-to-Digital Converter for SoC Clocking Applications" has been accepted in the IEEE TCAS-II. Congratulations!

<u>HPIC Lab</u> was selected for the "Development of High-Speed, Low-Power, and Low-Noise Clocking Network Systems for Optical Communication Chiplets" project (Outstanding Young Scientist Grant), sponsored by the National Research Foundation of Korea (NRF).
<u>Dong-Hoe</u> received the Best Paper Award (Silver Prize) at ICEIC 2024.
<u>Min-Seong</u> served as the Conference Secretary Chair for ICEIC 2024.
<u>Min-Seong</u> served on the Organizing Committee for ASP-DAC 2024.
<u>In-Woo</u> and <u>Kyu-Ran</u> received the IEEE CAS Student Design Contest Award.
<u>Min-Seong</u> served on the Technical Program Committee for ISOCC 2023.
<u>Min-Seong</u> has been appointed to the School of Electrical Engineering at Hanyang University.
